source: Parsed ncpcli current-devices capture from /Users/arjrr/.codex/memories/hsg.txt, HSG DG rack pairs from /Users/arjrr/tools/random-scripts/hsg_dg_report_recalculator.py, and the user-pasted HSG17 milestone text for HSG17.x-to-DG mapping.
assumptions: hsg.txt was treated as a live ncpcli current-devices -va capture after update-device-list --role qfabt0,qfabt1,qfabip; it is qfabric-filtered, not a full all-role design cutsheet.
Only HSG17 qfabric rows with roles qfabip, qfabt0, and qfabt1 were copied into the live_device_collection devices list, matching the AGA52 planar artifact style.
The DG rack map is parsed from the local HSG workbook tooling because hsg.txt contains rack locations but does not encode deployment group membership.
The pasted milestone text explicitly maps HSG17.2 to DG3-DG6, HSG17.3 to DG7-DG10, HSG17.4 to DG11-DG14, and HSG17.5 to DG15-DG18.
HSG17.7 and HSG17.8 were present as LANTRO headings in the pasted text, but no DG(...) rows were visible in the provided text; they are recorded without rack assignments.

summary.capture_device_scope: qfabric role-filtered rows from hsg.txt, not all HSG roles
summary.hsg17_total_device_scope: hsg17 qfabric rows only from the current hsg.txt capture

DG rack pairs from local HSG map.notes: Two racks per DG from DG_RACKS in hsg_dg_report_recalculator.py.

Milestone-mapped DG rack pairs.notes: Only HSG17.2-HSG17.5 DG rows were visible in the pasted milestone text.

connection_count_summary.notes: No HSG cutsheet connection-count data was included in hsg.txt or in the pasted milestone text.

Qfab validations (T0>T1, CPV Host >T0).comments: T1 to T0 Currently in progress

HSG17.7.notes: Heading was present in the pasted milestone text, but no DG(...) mapping row was visible in the provided content.

HSG17.8.notes: Heading was present in the pasted milestone text, but no DG(...) mapping row was visible in the provided content.

live_device_collection.device_scope: hsg17 qfabric rows only from role-filtered capture: qfabip, qfabt0, qfabt1

source_capture_summary_all_buildings.device_scope: qfabric role-filtered rows from hsg.txt after update-device-list --role qfabt0,qfabt1,qfabip

hsg17_all_roles_summary.device_scope: hsg17 qfabric rows only from role-filtered hsg.txt capture, not all HSG17 roles

anomalies: The current hsg.txt capture contains qfabric-filtered devices from hsg3 and hsg17; this artifact focuses the detailed live_device_collection on hsg17 qfabric rows.
Only 16 of 32 DGs were mapped to HSG17.x sections from the visible pasted milestone text; unmapped DGs remain in deployment_groups with hsg17_section=null.
HSG17.7 and HSG17.8 appear as milestone headings in the pasted text, but no visible DG(...) rows were provided for those sections.
The current hsg.txt capture is role-filtered; inherited all-role summary fields explicitly record that they summarize capture rows rather than a full HSG17 all-role inventory.
Connection count and full design rack counts were not inferred because neither hsg.txt nor the pasted milestone text includes HSG design cutsheet data.
